etymology.description: 亻(人, 'person') + 由(由, 'cause; reason') = person facilitating another to enjoy a meal
etymology.interpretation: The character 侑 combines 亻(亻) (rén, 'person'), which indicates a person, with 由(由) (yóu, 'cause') as the phonetic component. This suggests the act of facilitating or urging someone, particularly in context of eating or drinking, motivated by a reason or cause.
